uplink.description: Status uplink: battery + room temperature + room humidity (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. expected.data authored here: upstream emits voltage=2880 mV (-> battery 2.88 V), room_temperature=219 (tenths degC -> air.temperature 21.9), room_humidity=55 (-> air.relativeHumidity 55).
Synthetic in-bounds. Upstream decodes room_temperature = (0<<8)+225 = 225 (tenths degC -> 22.5).
Synthetic in-bounds. Upstream decodes humidity = 48 (percent -> air.relativeHumidity).

uplink.description: Status uplink: battery + set-point temperature (controller extra)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds. tx_en_reg=0x09 (battery|set-point). Upstream voltage=140*10+1500=2900 mV (-> battery 2.9 V), set_point_temperature=50*0.5=25.0 (controller state, no vocabulary home -> camelCase extra setPointTemperature).

uplink.description: Set-point temperature change (CMD_GET_SET_POINT, TTN example input)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. Upstream set_point_temperature = (43*0.5).toFixed(1) = "21.5"; emitted here as the numeric camelCase extra setPointTemperature (no vocabulary key for a thermostat set-point).
Synthetic. Command id 99 (0x63) is not in the upstream command set; our codec stops and reports it rather than silently mis-parsing.
Synthetic. CMD_GET_STATUS with tx_en_reg=0x02 (room temperature) but no temperature bytes follow; the 16-bit read would run off the end.
